ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo */,
  "team_colours" TEXT /* Team colours */,
  "team_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team Twitter handle */,
  "team_facebook_page" TEXT /* Team Facebook page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the sport was founded */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the sport */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL of the official rules of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coaching_licence" TEXT /* Coaching licence of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking_position" INTEGER /* Current ranking position of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the team */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_competition" TEXT /* Competition the match belongs to (e.g., league, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the player plays */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_agent" TEXT /* Player's agent */,
  "player_market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event team entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the event */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group of the team in the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., qualified, eliminated) */,
  "qualification_method" TEXT /* Method of qualification (e.g., automatic, wildcard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, fan) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., team, match, event) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, physiotherapist) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the staff member joined the team */,
  "staff_type" TEXT /* Type of staff (e.g., coaching, medical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., kit, equipment) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_sponsors" (
  "team_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team sponsor entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sponsors" (
  "event_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event sponsor entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., title, official) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)
